title: Zymo Quick-DNA/RNA Viral Kit Automation Protocol
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol automates nucleic acid purification...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates nucleic acid purification with the [Zymo Quick-DNA/RNA Viral MagBead Kit](https://www.zymoresearch.com/collections/quick-dna-rna-viral-kits/products/quick-dna-rna-viral-magbead) and is a modifed version of [this protocol](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/zymo-quick). In this version, tips are conserved to allow for a fully automated run of 96 samples. **Update (July 24, 2021)**: Added a new parameter - *Number of Samples* - to allow user to specify the number of samples used per run. Explanation of complex parameters below: **Number of Samples (1-96)**: Specify how many samples are used **P300-Multi Generation**: Select which P300-Multi is being used **P300-Mult Mount**: Select which mount the pipette is attached to **Magnetic Module Generation**: Select which version of the Magnetic Module is used ---

steps.title: Download your protocol and unzip if needed
steps.instruction: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
